response.overview: Join Magic Man and Letter Lizard on two educational animated adventures that introduce young children to the alphabet. In Alphabet Land, the pair travel by magic carpet through a colourful world where every giant letter is home to a different character and object beginning with that letter. In Magic Man Makes Letters Talk, Letter Lizard celebrates his birthday as friends arrive with alphabet-themed presents that teach the sounds of every letter from A to Z.
response.tagline: Learning the alphabet has never been so magical!
response.title: Laugh & Learn: ABCs
